brand.name: Leadership Books
brand.tagline: Become More — Author | Speaker | Thought Leader

offer.what: Two-sided platform: (1) curated leadership/business/finance/Christian book retailer with a quarterly Better Book Club membership, and (2) professional author publishing services (editorial, cover design, distribution, marketing, speakers bureau, book launch mastermind). Built on Shopify.
offer.coreOutcome: Readers: stay ahead as a leader through curated, high-impact books. Authors: transform a message into a professionally published book that builds a platform, speaking career, and movement.
offer.pricePoint: Books: ~$15–$45 each. Better Book Club: ~$60/quarter (6 curated books + author events + LinkedIn group + free shipping). Author Representation listing: ~$97–$1,170. Premium Publishing Package: $15,197. Book Launch Mastermind VIP: ~$1,170. First-order discount: $10 off with code FIRST10.
offer.commitment: Books: one-off purchase. Book Club: recurring quarterly subscription. Publishing packages: one-off high-ticket contract ($1,170–$15,197+).
leadMagnets: Free Publishing Services Webcast (webinar for aspiring authors)
Free Book Consultation with Acquisitions Team (discovery call)

audience.icp: Two distinct ICPs: (1) Avid leader/reader — business executives, entrepreneurs, managers, and high-achievers who consume 40–60 books/year and want curated, high-signal recommendations. (2) Aspiring author/thought leader — business leaders, coaches, speakers, pastors, and professionals who have a message to share and want professional publishing support without surrendering their rights.
painPoints: Readers overwhelmed by book volume and can't identify which titles are worth their time
Leaders want peer-level curation and community around reading, not just Amazon algorithms
Authors locked out of traditional publishing or burned by poor self-publishing platforms
Authors lose rights, earn low royalties, and receive no real marketing or platform support
Aspiring speakers/thought leaders lack the publishing credential and media exposure to grow influence
segments: Book buyers — individual leaders/executives purchasing titles one-off
Book Club members — recurring readers seeking curated quarterly selections
Aspiring authors — professionals ready to write/publish their first book
Published authors seeking re-launch, representation, or speaking engagements
Pastors/ministry leaders (Christian leadership books collection is prominent)

salesCycle.length: Books: same-day self-serve. Book Club: days (low friction subscription). Publishing packages: weeks to months (webcast → discovery call → proposal → purchase).
salesCycle.trial: Free Publishing Webcast and Free Book Consultation serve as trial/demo for publishing services. $10 off first order lowers barrier for first book purchase.
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Books/Book Club: self-serve Shopify checkout. Publishing services: booked discovery/consultation call with Acquisitions Team, then proposal.
salesCycle.topObjection: For authors: 'Why not Amazon KDP or traditional publishing?' (cost vs. control/quality trade-off). For readers: 'Why pay for curation when I can pick books myself?'

ahaMoment: Readers: first curated book from the Better Book Club arrives — quality selection validates the membership. Authors: the free webcast or discovery call where they realize they'll have a true creative co-pilot, keep 100% of rights, and get a real marketing strategy — not just a print button.

retention.recurring: Better Book Club — quarterly subscription. Renewal cadence = every 90 days.
retention.expansion: Book Club member → Author Publishing Package. One-time book buyer → Book Club subscriber. Published author → Book Launch Mastermind, Speakers Bureau representation, Author Summit ticket.
retention.churnRisk: Book Club members who accumulate unread books and cancel. Publishing clients who complete one package and don't re-engage for launch mastermind or second book. One-off book buyers who never return after first purchase.

lifecycleGaps: No visible welcome/onboarding sequence for new Book Club subscribers to drive early engagement (discuss first book, join LinkedIn group)
No apparent automated nurture sequence converting free webcast viewers or consultation leads into publishing package buyers
No win-back/re-engagement flow for lapsed Book Club subscribers
No referral or advocacy program visible for satisfied authors or Book Club members
No value newsletter cadence surfaced — blog/content presence not prominently featured
One-off book buyers likely fall into a black hole with no follow-up to upsell Book Club
toneVoice: Aspirational and empowering — 'Become More', 'Let Your Story Shine', 'Turn your book into a movement.' Warm but professional. Mission-driven and purpose-forward. Speaks to ambition without arrogance. Blends entrepreneurial energy with publishing gravitas. Uses first-person plural ('we') when describing services — positions the team as a creative co-pilot, not a vendor.
compliance: Standard e-commerce CAN-SPAM / GDPR. No healthcare, finance, or legal vertical constraints. Shopify platform with likely Klaviyo or Shopify Email for ESP.
